title: Section 23
content: Any person who being required by or under this Act to furnish any return fails to furnish such return or furnishes a return containing any particular which is false and which he knows to be false or does not believe to be true shall 1[be liable to penalty which may extend to ten thousand rupees].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 2023, s. 2 and Schedule, for certain words (w.e.f. 16-8-2024).
